BaseTemplate.description: Starter code for your Nextjs Boilerplate with Tailwind CSS

Index.meta_description: Next js Boilerplate is the perfect starter code for your project. Build your React application with the Next.js framework.

Counter.security_powered_by: Security, bot detection and rate limiting powered by

CounterForm.presentation: The counter is stored in the database and incremented by the value you provide.

About.about_paragraph: Welcome to our About page! We are a team of passionate individuals dedicated to creating amazing software.

Portfolio.presentation: Welcome to my portfolio page! Here you will find a carefully curated collection of my work and accomplishments. Through this portfolio, I'm to showcase my expertise, creativity, and the value I can bring to your projects.

PortfolioSlug.content: Created a set of promotional materials and branding elements for a corporate event. Crafted a visually unified theme, encompassing a logo, posters, banners, and digital assets. Integrated the client's brand identity while infusing it with a contemporary and innovative approach.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

Dashboard.alternative_message: Need advanced features? Multi-tenancy & Teams, Roles & Permissions, Shadcn UI, End-to-End Typesafety with oRPC, Stripe Payment, Light / Dark mode. Try <url></url>.
Dashboard.max_message: Or, need a Self-hosted auth stack (Better Auth)? Try <url></url>.

DashboardOverviewPage.title: Turn your material into practice
DashboardOverviewPage.description: Upload study material, generate exercises from ready documents, and track how your recent answers are improving.
DashboardOverviewPage.jobs_card_description: Generation jobs stay visible here while new exercises are being prepared.
DashboardOverviewPage.score_card_description: Average score across your 20 most recent responses.
DashboardOverviewPage.step_content_description: Upload a PDF, save a URL, or paste text so the workspace has searchable study material.
DashboardOverviewPage.step_exercises_description: Pick ready documents, choose an exercise type, and keep answering from one focused practice page.
DashboardOverviewPage.step_progress_description: Check recent attempts, filter by document, and watch short-term score movement.

DashboardExercisesPage.title: Exercise generator
DashboardExercisesPage.description: Create practice exercises from your ready documents.
DashboardExercisesPage.documents_help: Select one or more ready documents.
DashboardExercisesPage.state_no_documents_description: You do not have any uploaded documents yet. Start in the content library to add a PDF, URL, or text.
DashboardExercisesPage.state_processing_description: {count, plural, one {# document is still processing.} other {# documents are still processing.}}
DashboardExercisesPage.state_failed_description: {count, plural, one {# document failed to process. Remove it or upload a replacement from the content page.} other {# documents failed to process. Remove them or upload replacements from the content page.}}
DashboardExercisesPage.state_partial_processing: {count, plural, one {# other document is still processing.} other {# other documents are still processing.}}
DashboardExercisesPage.state_partial_failed: {count, plural, one {# document still needs attention because it failed.} other {# documents still need attention because they failed.}}

DashboardContentPage.title: Prepare your study material
DashboardContentPage.description: Upload PDFs, save URLs, or paste text. Documents stay here while they process, fail, or become ready for exercise generation.
DashboardContentPage.upload_description: Choose the format that matches your study material. New uploads appear in the library below as soon as the API accepts them.
DashboardContentPage.pdf_help: Upload one PDF up to 10 MB.
DashboardContentPage.text_placeholder: Paste at least 100 characters of Italian study material.
DashboardContentPage.pdf_missing_file: Choose a PDF file before uploading.
DashboardContentPage.text_missing_value: Add a title and enough text before uploading.
DashboardContentPage.upload_validation_error: Please check the upload fields and try again.
DashboardContentPage.upload_accepted: Upload accepted. The document will appear as it starts processing.
DashboardContentPage.library_description: Track document status, review source metadata, and remove failed or outdated material.
DashboardContentPage.library_empty: No documents yet. Upload a PDF, URL, or text to get started.
DashboardContentPage.delete_dialog_description: Delete "{title}" from your library? This action removes the document and its related study data.
DashboardContentPage.error_boundary_description: The content page could not render. Reload the workspace and try again.

DashboardProgressPage.title: Review recent performance
DashboardProgressPage.description: Browse recent answers, narrow the history to one source document, and watch short-term score movement.
DashboardProgressPage.history_empty: No recent attempts match this filter yet.
DashboardProgressPage.error_boundary_description: The progress page could not render. Reload the workspace and try again.
